observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
import json
# Minimal test with just a var decl
j = {'kind': 'TranslationUnitDecl', 'id': '0x0', 'inner': [{'kind': 'VarDecl', 'id': '0x1', 'name': 'x', 'type': {'qualType': 'int'}, 'inner': [{'kind': 'IntegerLiteral', 'type': {'qualType': 'int'}, 'value': '42', 'valueCategory': 'prvalue'}]}]}
with open('/tmp/test_var.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(j, f)
print('Written')
" && timeout 5 bash -c '/workspace/YatCC/build/task/3/task3 /tmp/test_var.json /tmp/t3_var.ll 2>&1; echo EXIT:\$?'
